Nevederia's Right Eye  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +7 INT: +7 AGI: +15 MANA: +75 ENDUR: +75
SV FIRE: +4 SV DISEASE: +4 SV COLD: +4 SV MAGIC: +4 SV POISON: +4
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Nevederia's Right Eye
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +7 INT: +7 AGI: +15 MANA: +75 ENDUR: +75
SV FIRE: +4 SV DISEASE: +4 SV COLD: +4 SV MAGIC: +4 SV POISON: +4
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:Shield
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:zebantik
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:06
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Lady Nevederia


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded July 5th, 2022 by halfridge

u r all idiots

# Aug 27 2002 at 12:37 PM Rating: Default

115 posts
You all say this item sucks because of the lack of one stat, and mostly what im hearing is wis. INT casters dont give a d@mn about that. All i can say is this item ROCKS for range slot

What
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2001 at 8:05 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757464726
261 posts
Treetrimmer, what better ranged item would a cleric have compared to this? I'm curious. I have an idol of thorned and that's likely to stay there until I get something along these lines.
▲ Page top
RE: What
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2002 at 6:57 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361737014
226 posts
Well, I am not exactly how uber you are talking about but here it goes. Just a few items of varying difficulty to get.

https://everquest.allakhazam.com/equipment/graphics19/Torch_of_Judgement.gif From VT

https://everquest.allakhazam.com/equipment/graphics18/nocnivins_small_book_of_logic.jpg From Ssra

https://everquest.allakhazam.com/equipment/graphics15/brainofcazicthule.jpg From Fear

https://everquest.allakhazam.com/equipment/graphics18/shard_unfathomable_depths.jpg From the Deep.

If you are able to kill Lady Nev then you should be able to at least get the Brain from Fear off of CT, and the Shard from the Deep off of The Burrower Beast.

There are more items that are easier to get than this eye and are what I would consider better. I am guessing that being a High Priest you have max wisdom without KEI so you would be looking more for mana/resists/hp items.
▲ Page top

# Oct 02 2001 at 10:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766753272
View User Forum
127 posts
what this is is a caster range item , the wis intl plus mana=caster/hybrid. Ac is NOT the only consideration in shots at stuff. It is a similar trap the "this is a monk item" people fall into.
Where the STR STA and dex, if this here tank range slot item? hybrids would be secondary to the priests and casters for this item. The LEFT EYE is a tank range slot item btw.
